The difference

Before Agrovia vs. after.

Before

  • ✕ Manual data entry
  • ✕ 3-5 days to close
  • ✕ Spreadsheet financials
  • ✕ Tax season panic
  • ✕ No client visibility
  • ✕ $200+/mo for QB

After

  • ✓ CSV import + AI
  • ✓ Close in hours
  • ✓ One-click reports
  • ✓ 7 IRS tools built in
  • ✓ Client portal
  • ✓ Free to start

FAQ

Common questions.

How is this different from QuickBooks?

Built for CPA firms managing multiple clients across industries. IRS tools, client portal, multi-industry — no add-ons.

Is my data secure?

Supabase with Row Level Security on every table. Encrypted at rest and in transit.

Can I try before signing up?

Yes. Click "Try now" — full platform, sample data, 3 seconds.

What banks do you support?

CSV and PDF. Chase, Wells Fargo, BofA parsers. AI categorization.

How many clients?

Free: 3. Pro: unlimited. Each gets ledger, statements, portal.

© 2026 Agrovia · info@accountingsharks.com

KPI Dashboard

Net Income, Gross Revenue, Total Expenses, Est. Tax — all at a glance for each client.

Revenue Chart

Monthly Revenue vs Expenses with Income and Expense breakdowns. Jan-Dec view.

Schedule C Summary

Line-by-line IRS form preview. Gross Receipts, COGS, Net Profit — mapped to real form lines.

Recent Transactions

Live feed of latest transactions across all accounts with amounts and source.

Client Overview — Dashboard
KPIs, revenue chart, Schedule C, expense breakdown, recent transactions
Revenue & Expense KPIs

Instant totals — Revenue, Expenses, Net, and Pending transactions at the top.

Smart Filters

Filter by All, Revenue, Expenses, Cleared, Pending Review, or Reconciled status.

AI Auto-Categorization

Each transaction shows category + AI confidence score (96-99%). Auto-grouped by month.

Running Balance

See running balance after every transaction. Color-coded status: Cleared, Pending, Reconciled.

Smart Ledger — Transactions
AI-categorized, month-grouped, running balance, multi-status filtering
Upload or Connect

Import CSV/PDF bank statements or connect directly via Plaid (12,000+ banks).

Match Statistics

Matched vs Unmatched count, bank balance, and unmatched amount at a glance.

One-Click Reconcile

75% progress bar. Hit "Reconcile 12 Matched" to clear all confirmed matches at once.

Side-by-Side Matching

Bank statement ↔ Ledger entry with confidence scores. Unmatch, Find Match, or Import as New.

Bank Reconciliation
Auto-match engine, Plaid sync, side-by-side matching, confidence scoring
